# Global Data Job Market Analysis
## Overview

This project analyzes global salary trends in data-related roles using a structured exploratory data analysis approach.

## Dataset

* Source: Kaggle – Data Science Salaries Dataset
* Records: 46,637 (after cleaning)
* Features: Experience level, company size, remote ratio, country, salary in USD

## Key Findings

* Median salary: $139,100
* Experience level strongly influences compensation
* Remote roles do not significantly alter salary
* Medium-sized companies offer highest median pay
* US dominates both salary level and job volume

## Tools Used

* Python
* Pandas
* Seaborn
* Matplotlib

## Skills

* Data Cleaning
* Statistical Interpretation
* Data Visualization
* Business Insight Extraction
